text_raw: Last time I went to fetch a wagon myself, I nearly got killed.
text_clean: Last time I went to fetch a wagon myself, I nearly got killed.

text_raw: Working the field's not enough to keep everyone fed,
text_clean: Working the field's not enough to keep everyone fed,

text_raw: but at least I know a bit of carpentry so it's helping put food on the table.
text_clean: but at least I know a bit of carpentry so it's helping put food on the table.

text_raw: Greymane, excellent timing...!
text_clean: Greymane, excellent timing...!

text_raw: There are a number of abandoned wagons about here,
text_clean: There are a number of abandoned wagons about here,

text_raw: and I'd like to salvage any we can before those bloody bandits swoop in and claim them!
text_clean: and I'd like to salvage any we can before those bloody bandits swoop in and claim them!

text_raw: I'd go myself, but the bandits are crawling all over, thinking they own the place.
text_clean: I'd go myself, but the bandits are crawling all over, thinking they own the place.

text_raw: My thanks! I promise the reward will be worth your while.
text_clean: My thanks! I promise the reward will be worth your while.

text_raw: My son here will guide you to the wagons.
text_clean: My son here will guide you to the wagons.

text_raw: It's this way.
text_clean: It's this way.

text_raw: Greymane, come this way!
text_clean: Greymane, come this way!

text_raw: Lots of folk have been ditching their wagons lately.
text_clean: Lots of folk have been ditching their wagons lately.

text_raw: While fleeing from the bandits—they're everywhere!
text_clean: While fleeing from the bandits—they're everywhere!

text_raw: You should see a wagon any moment now.
text_clean: You should see a wagon any moment now.

text_raw: But with you here, I'm not worried about a thing.
text_clean: But with you here, I'm not worried about a thing.

text_raw: I'll see you back at the farm.
text_clean: I'll see you back at the farm.

text_raw: Come, it's this way.
text_clean: Come, it's this way.

text_raw: Doesn't matter how busted the wagon is,
text_clean: Doesn't matter how busted the wagon is,

text_raw: just bring it to us and we'll fix it right up.
text_clean: just bring it to us and we'll fix it right up.

text_raw: No sense in letting it go to waste when we could turn it into coin, right?
text_clean: No sense in letting it go to waste when we could turn it into coin, right?

text_raw:
And if you come across any abandoned wagons in the future,
don't hesitate to bring them our way.
text_clean:
And if you come across any abandoned wagons in the future,
don't hesitate to bring them our way.

text_raw: We can always use more.
text_clean: We can always use more.

text_raw: I could make them good as new with a bit of work.
text_clean: I could make them good as new with a bit of work.

text_raw: There are bandits ahead, so we'd better move with caution.
